creator: joe@chthonixia.net
text:
I am currently trying to use Shotwell 0.15 to organize some photos, but
the current version is crashing with a message that basically indicates
it is failing to play a file; and it is also leaving two core files:

shotwell-video-thum.core
shotwell.core

Running strings on the video-thum.core indicates that shotwell fails on
this file: M16.mpg and then on this file: julia_reel.mpg. These files
used to successfully import.

I notice on the Shotwell page for 0.18 release notes that:

* Fixed resource leak when importing videos

Perhaps an upgrade to Shotwell .18 will remedy this issue.

Fix: 

.18, according to the web page, remedies this.
How-To-Repeat: Open shotwell, and wait until it crashes; if so, it is likely to be choking on a video file.
